name: Classic Pomade
description: A strong-hold pomade you can shape and style as required to achieve a classic, high-gloss finish. Water-soluble and easy to wash out.
ingredients: Aqua, Ceteareth-25, Sodium Cocoamphoacetate, Glycerin, PVP, Propylene Glycol, PEG-75 Lanolin, Polyquaternium-11, Parfum, Linalool, Tetrasodium EDTA, BHT, Diazolidinyl Urea, Iodopropynyl Butylcarbamate, CI14700, CI42090.
